omitted_declarations.policy_reference: When you interact with us via support or feedback, we will also collect certain personal data generated by your use of the Service or personal data that you choose to share with us to better respond to your inquiries. We may, in accordance with applicable law, record your communication with our support team or with other similar contact channels.
